First up today, **Dylan Byers** explains what Politico poaching NBCвҖҷs **Dasha Burns** says about the dismal state of television news, the uncertainty inside 30 Rock, and the future of Politico, itself. Then Dylan provides the latest readout from across the Potomac, where *Washington Post* staffers are *still* waiting for **Will Lewis** to announce a вҖңchange agentвҖқ editor to lead the newsroom.     Plus, below the fold: **Rachel Strugatz** considers whether Rhode, **Hailey Bieber** вҖҷs nine-figure beauty business, can avoid GoopвҖҷs вҖңkey man risk.вҖқ **John Heilemann** sits down with House Democratic leader **Hakeem Jeffries** to discuss the future of bipartisanship under **Trump** . **Baratunde Thurston** connects with **Eriq Gardner** , in a special conversation presented by Meta, to reveal how Hollywood is countenancing the rise of A.I. On *SomebodyвҖҷs Gotta Win* , **Tara Palmeri** rings up veterans advocate **Paul Rieckhoff** to unpack **Pete Hegseth** вҖҷs charm campaign. And on *The Powers That Be* , **John Ourand** joins **Peter Hamby** for a candid chat about the booming college football business and **Bill Belichick** вҖҷs path to Chapel Hill.     *P.S.* , *if you havenвҖҷt taken our survey for the second installment of PuckвҖҷs Private Conversation series, powered by Orchestra, thereвҖҷs still time to [fill it out by clicking here](https://email.puck.) !* | |  | | [Mrs. Burns Goes to Washington](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUdklNa0x5eDFwR0J6Y3hvUjhEND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9saXRpY28tcG9hY2hlcy1kYXNoYS1idXJucy10aGUtbG93LXdhc2hpbmd0b24tcG9zdC8_) | | DYLAN BYERS | | News and notes on the recruitment of Dasha Burns, raided from the increasingly gloomy halls of 30 Rock, as Politico seeks their new Maggie. Plus the latest updates on Jeff BezosвҖҷs narrowing talent search for a вҖңchange agentвҖқ to transform The Washington Post. | | | |  | | --- | | **A MESSAGE FROM META** | |  | | **Open Source AI: Available to all, not just the few**     MetaвҖҷs open source AI enables small businesses, start-ups, students, researchers and more to download and build with our models at no cost.     When AI models are open source, theyвҖҷre available to all. And when AI models are available to all, everyone benefits.   [**Learn more about open source AI.**](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUdklNa0x5eDFwR0J6Y3hvUjhEND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cDovL2FpLm1ldGEuY29tL29wZW4_) | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [The Colossus of Rhode](https://email.puck.) | | RACHEL STRUGATZ | | Rhode, the Hailey Bieber-founded beauty brand, has scaled up from a one-off celebrity lip gloss line into a nine-figure business with aspirations to be the Skims of beautyвҖ”and that includes charting a future thatвҖҷs less dependent on its famous founder. | |  | | [HakeemвҖҷs State of the Union](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUdklNa0x5eDFwR0J6Y3hvUjhEND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvaGFrZWVtLWplZmZyaWVzLXN0YXRlLW9mLXRoZS11bmlvbi8_) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | A sprawling conversation with the Pelosi protГ©gГ© and House Democratic leader on some of the most pressing issues facing Democrats in the near and long-term: reconstituting the party after NovemberвҖҷs crushing defeat, countenancing TrumpвҖҷs screwball cabinet nominations, and what bipartisanship will actually look like over the next four years. | |  | | [HollywoodвҖҷs A.I. Paradox](https://email.puck.) | | BARATUNDE THURSTON | | A candid conversation with PuckвҖҷs resident legal expert about the myriad ways that A.I. is poised to change Hollywood, from its potential to transform the talent landscape to how the townвҖҷs agencies are bracing for impact. | | | |  | | --- | |  | |  | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Pete HegsethвҖҷs War on the Pentagon](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUdklNa0x5eDFwR0J6Y3hvUjhEND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL3BldGUtaGVnc2V0aHMtd2FyLW9uLXRoZS1wZW50YWdvbi8_) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tara is joined by the host of the вҖҳIndependent AmericansвҖҷ podcast, Paul Rieckhoff, to discuss Pete HegsethвҖҷs bid to be secretary of defense in Donald TrumpвҖҷs upcoming administration. They break down the tactics MAGA devotees are employing to pressure senators into accepting PeteвҖҷs nomination, examine the culture wars developing within the U.S. military, and talk about why TrumpвҖҷs D.N.I. nominee, Tulsi Gabbard, is an equally controversial choice for. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [BelichickвҖҷs Chapel Hill Escapade](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & JOHN OURAND | | John Ourand joins Peter for a candid conversation about the booming college football business as the inaugural CFP is slated to begin this weekendвҖ”and Bill BelichickвҖҷs striking move to become UNCвҖҷs next head coach. Then they discuss whether the NBA Cup is having a positive impact on the leagueвҖҷs ratings and competition. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUdklNa0x5eDFwR0J6Y3hvUjhEND0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
